channel.title: Projects on Hazed Visions Games
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Hazed Visions Games

item.title: Frontier: isometric turn-based strategy game (WIP)
item.description: First demo shown to the public at Pixel Heaven 2016. Demonstrating some of the game mechanics. New terrain engine & railway system. Procedural river generation (prototyping). Procedural rivers integrated into gameplay.

item.title: FreeFT: isometric action game engine
item.description: FreeFT is an open-source, real-time, isometric action game engine. inspired by Fallout Tactics, a game from 2001 created by an Australian company, Micro Forte. It requires assets from this game to work, so if you want to run the demos, you have to own Fallout Tactics. Engine works very well on low end platforms with integrated GPUs. It required a caching system for textures which minimized OpenGL state changes & fast tile-based sorting algorithm for sprites.
